title: Reader Outcomes, Publisher Respect, and Product Contract · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in inclusive feed-reader product contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debug…
objectives: Define reader population, decision, task journey, accepted delay, failure harm, and observable learning or research value.
Specify respectful identification, fetch cadence, caching, correction, deletion, source pause, and incident contact behavior.
Separate source discovery, ingestion, storage, scheduling, API, reader state, and presentation with explicit accepted unknowns.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Reader Job
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 4244 during a cross-tenant privacy and cache audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to gate reader, publisher, inclusive, privacy, and changed-case product outcomes; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then change one tenant, cursor, reader command, authorization, validator, sanitizer, or accessibility condition without leaking state. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define reader population, decision, task journey, accepted delay, failure harm, and observable learning or research value.

Inspect the Feed Ts Reader Job trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Feed Ts Acceptance Matrix
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-TypeScript function headed "// Evidence: feed-ts-acceptance-matrix-1wel8i" that uses case 7235 to gate reader, publisher, inclusive, privacy, and changed-case product outcomes. Keep defaults runnable and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import Node APIs, open streams or sockets, parse through native XML libraries, contact publishers, access PostgreSQL, read host files, handle real signals, leave timers, handles, or Promise rejections, or claim native runtime, load, accessibility, container, backup, restore, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with TypeScript 7.0.2, the TypeScript 6.0.2 compatibility surface, Node 24.18.0, Express 5.2.1, pg 8.22.0, fast-xml-parser 5.10.0, Zod 4.4.3, PostgreSQL 18.4, original unknown fixtures, controlled Fetch and stream adapters, emitted-runtime and subprocess tests, disposable databases, handle inspection, package and image review, accessibility, capacity, backup, restore, rollback, and release gates.
